productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Pretty Blossom Blue Top
description: Style NoteLight summer pastel colours on your little diva - keep her happy, cool and comfortable this summer. This Gini & Jony tee is perfect for the summer (it's sleeveless!) and can be worn inside a zip-up sweater during the winter. Now what's not to love?Product DetailsAqua blue and white sleeveless top with a round neck, has print on the chest and paneling on the chestMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroidery
